title: 18pcs Mochi Squishy Toys, Mini Jungle Animals Squishies Soft Squeeze Fidget Toys Kawaii Stress Relief Toys for Boys Girls Birthday Party Favors
features: What will you get: You will get 18 mochi squishy toys, including various cute animals such as turtles, ducks, sheep, elephants, pandas, each packaged separately, with bright colors and cute designs. These toys are good gifts for birthdays and Children's Day.
Kawaii Design: Our animal squishy toys comes in 18 cute designs, allowing children to simulate zoos and jungle games. Every child will love it and make their day full of joy.

Safe Material: This squishies fidget toys are made of safe material TPR like rubber, safe nice elasticity and not easy to damage, feels comfortable and soft, could relieve pressure, and you could play with your children anytime, anywhere.(Please don’t put it in your mouth, children are best to play under the supervision of adults.)
Reusable: The squishy toys could be reused, when it gets dirty, it could be washed with mild detergent or soap. If it's too sticky when dry, sprinkle some baby powder.

Wide Range of Applications: The stress relief toys is a great choice for kids gifts and party decorations.And it suit for Halloween gifts, Christmas gifts, birthday gifts, Valentine Gifts, Easter Gifts, New Year's gifts,Easter egg hunt, etc. It's also good for collection, decoration, and stress relief toys.
description: Product Description Parents can play with mochi toys with their children. There are 18 kinds of animals such as sheep, elephants, puppies, ducks and so on. They can tell their children the types, names and colors of the animals, playing with the kids. Our soft mochi toys could be given as present to children, students, could also increase parent-child, interaction between children, and could also be a toy display at a children's party. Parent-child interaction. Holiday present for kids. Play with friends.
